## Usage Guide

### For TpT Upload
Use these files:
- All level COLOR PDFs (files 3, 6, 9, 12)
- All level BW PDFs (files 4, 7, 10, 13)
- Cover pages (files 17-21)

- TpT documentation (file 16)

### For Preview/Marketing
Use these files:
- Preview PDFs with watermarks (files 5, 8, 11, 14)
- Freebie sample (file 22)
- Cover pages (files 17-21)

### For Teachers

- Main complete PDFs (files 1-2) OR individual level PDFs
- Quick Start guide
- Terms of Use
